You will be given a short quiz to test your background and passion for data analytics and artificial intelligence.

-Optimize chatbot responses and AI-driven decision support.
-Communicate insights and apply solutions to improve processes.

Qualifications:
-Proficiency in Python, SQL, Java, or JavaScript.
-Experience with data science, AI, or NLP is a plus.
-Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.
-Ability to work independently and adapt in a fast-paced environment.
-Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Business Analytics, or Finance.

This internship offers hands-on AI-driven data science experience in finance, with mentorship and potential course credit.

info:
THE ROLE 
Come join Tesla Sensing Team! We develop state-of-the-art sensor technologies and solutions that enable the best customer driving experiences. You will have an opportunity to participate in conceiving, modeling, and prototyping new sensor solutions. You will be able to learn how a brilliant idea is taken from proof-of-concept to product launch. If you are a self-driven and hands-on individual, we welcome you to this creative and fast-paced environment! 
  
RESPONSIBILITIES﻿ 
Drive the design and execution of sensing subsystems through the following: 
Distill sensor product requirements into constraints and actionable engineering systems design discussions. 
Host cross-functional sensor design discussions with electrical, software, manufacturing, mechanical design, and service teams. 
Translate sensor design discussions into design documents in the form of system block diagrams, functional requirements, and performance requirements. 
Define sensor hardware and software interfaces. 
Support early sensor prototype development to de-risk new technologies. 
Define an integration test plan for sensing hardware products or software features with integration milestones that focus on de-risking product or feature deployment and align with the program timeline. 
Execute initial sensor bring-up and integration testing at the vehicle level to validate system design assumptions. 
Perform change impact analysis for change requests by summarizing impacted devices, interfaces, and processes in the hardware and software domain. 
Ensure sensing system is characterized across a host of environments. 
Support system validation teams in developing electrical and software test plans. 
Statistical analysis of manufacturing and user data to quantify performance of the sensor in system and vehicle level.

info: 欢迎查看深度视界(深圳市深度文化传媒有限公司)的招贤纳士英雄帖。深度视界是深圳一线的创意型影视广告公司，在南宁有一定的业务覆盖，并在积极筹备设立分支机构。我们年轻，激情，上进，非常强调创意和原创，每个作品都精益求精，拒绝套路。深度视界创意出品的作品不胜枚举，获得过数十枚国内外奖项，任职要求：我们极其重视人才的培养，在众多成功的人才培养案例的经验下，我们非常接纳靠谱的有潜力的大二到大四的学生，我们相信能在我们的培养下胜任这个岗位。我们给予同行中极具竞争力的自由工作制，无需坐班，实习津贴2000元/月，任务工作量约为每周20小时自由安排：远程与深圳团队视频头脑风暴，自由安排时间在deadline前完成创作文案任务（协调外派剧组、协调当地客户时除外，需赴南宁拍摄现场，大约每月1次）。我司基本每两周会有人员赴当地出差或驻点当地，面对面进行交流。亦欢迎前来深圳参与本地项目。（实习）创意文案的岗位职责：1、（协助）公司视频创意广告/微电影/企业宣传片/产品广告片等视频的内容创意构思2、（协助）面对客户进行创意阐述，逻辑清晰，对每个画面都能说出其存在的理由3、（协助）与导演和其他执行团队进行深度沟通讨论，片场跟进，协助方案执行到位4、（协助）与后期制作部门沟通讨论，二次创作，让视频作品拥有创意的灵魂你需要有：  1、无需前置经验，但必须热爱影视、广告，且必须有出彩的创意能力。我司对创意要求高，阅片量不足将无法胜任此岗位。2、创意独特，思维逻辑清晰，具备客户及市场分析能力。  3、能（协助团队成员）凭借的创意、策划能力，针对客户项目、品牌所存在的问题，提供极富创意的解决方案；对公司的创意出品体系及内部工作流程提供专业性的建议与意见.  4、熟练使用各种办公软件，具备基本的网络知识，了解各种近期网络热点事件。  5、能够（在团队帮助下）独立高效地完成文案撰写工作。  6、思维活跃，具备文笔与审美品位，思路清晰，能准确的把握客户意图，善于跟客户沟通，具备一定的提案能力。  7、面试（视频面试）请携带个人成功案例作品（可以是文字故事，可以是粗糙的视频，我们看的只是创意，因为我们对制作有信心）9、传统宣传片案例无法加分，案例请选择创意作品或非传统宣传片作品。总结：  高逼格、爱原创、懂审美、点子多、爱时尚、一稿亮瞎众人眼你将有机会：  看到自己创意的画面变成现实；  亲临片场，实地体验制作过程；  观摩后期，了解神奇的黑技术；  成为批体验一些创新产品的人；  成为波了解一些神奇项目的人；  重要的，与一批跟你一样靠谱的伙伴们紧密合作，共同攻坚，升华自我！我们提供：  1、年轻有活力的成长团队    2、双休+法定节假日    3、超级高手薪资面议

info:
岗位职责

1. 数据收集与整理：从销售系统、电商平台、市场调研、问卷星等多渠道收集销售数据、客户信息、市场动态数据等，确保数据的完整性与准确性。对收集到的数据进行清洗，识别并纠正重复、错误或不完整的数据记录，运用数据透视表、函数公式等工具对数据进行分类汇总，为后续分析做准备。

2. 数据分析协助：在上级指导下，运用Excel等分析工具，对销售趋势、客户行为、市场占有率等关键指标进行分析。通过数据分析挖掘数据背后的潜在规律和问题，为业务决策提供数据支持，例如分析不同渠道的销售贡献，找出销售增长或下滑的原因。

3. 报告整理与呈现：协助整理部门内部的各类报告，包括销售周报、月报、项目报告等，确保报告内容条理清晰、数据准确。将数据分析结果以可视化的形式呈现，如制作柱状图、折线图、饼图等图表，使数据更直观易懂，提升报告的可读性。

任职要求

1. 专业背景：本科及以上学历，统计学、数学、经济学、市场营销、电子商务等相关专业的在校学生优先考虑。

2. 技能要求：熟练掌握Office办公软件，尤其是Excel的数据处理与分析功能，如数据透视表、函数运用等；具备一定的数据分析思维，能够理解并运用基本的数据分析方法；对数据有较强的敏感度，善于从数据中发现问题和规律。

3. 素质能力：工作认真负责，注重细节，具备高度的责任心和严谨的工作态度，能够保证数据的准确性和报告的质量。具备良好的沟通能力和团队协作精神，能够与不同部门的同事进行有效的沟通与合作。拥有较强的学习能力和适应能力，能够快速掌握新知识和新技能，适应不断变化的工作需求。

info:
THE ROLE
We are looking for a highly motivated and talented engineer to join the Battery Structures Team. Our team is responsible for a wide range of components which house multiple battery subsystems. We also provide key structural members that influence overall vehicle performance. The core focus of our group is integration, packaging, and structural design. Our battery not only provides structure to the internal components but is also a critical part of the overall vehicle structure to create the most efficient and safe vehicles.

RESPONSIBILITIES
A few part designs, from concept to production launch by supporting from mentor
3D design and GD&T drawings of complex parts and basic assemblies
Any CAE skill such as Solidworks/Ansys is a plus
Support ongoing/continuous product and process improvement
Owning/supporting basic testing and analysis
Root causing test failures and production problems
Collaboration with other teams inside Tesla (manufacturing, testing, NPI, supply chain, etc.)
Active communication with suppliers for DFM
Respond to problems on the production line, perform root cause analysis, develop a solution, and validate the solution before pushing to production.

REQUIREMENTS
Any structural design experience from school/internship is a plus
Good engineering fundamentals in materials and mechanics
Demonstrated ability to create products: CAD design to hands-on prototyping
Basic knowledges about some of manufacturing processes such as plastic injection molding, metal stamping, extrusion, welding/brazing, heat treating, and bonding
A detail-oriented personality with basic documentation and reporting skills
Better to have CAD skills in 3D modeling; CATIA V5/3DX experience a plus
Can defining test plans, designing test setups, and analyzing data
Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering
Experience designing for automations/robots…
Experience with FSAE, SAE Baja, Solar Car, Hyperloop, etc. is a plus

info:
THE ROLE
As a Launch and Sustaining Engineer in Tesla’s Vehicle Engineering Group, you will be responsible for local release and launch of vehicle components and systems for upcoming Vehicle production in GFSH & Fremont. You will be part of the global team that creates and executes world-class vehicles in terms of form, function and luxury. 

RESPONSIBILITIES
Along with Tesla’s global vehicle engineering team, you will locally work with Lead Thermal Engineer to support release and launch thermal components and subsystems which are aligned with program product profile with responsibilities that include:
•	Support local changes, initiated by the Global team, of parts and systems according to Tesla Change Management process.
•	Support and scrutinize vehicle production to achieve highest quality production standards regarding the thermal and HVAC system through process analysis, regular observation of assembly process, interacting with Production Quality, Production and EOL repair teams.
•	Drive continued improvement to production processes and equipment to achieve highest quality standards if deemed necessary.
•	Implement processes and quality metrics to achieve world class execution of cutting-edge automotive thermal and HVAC systems.

REQUIREMENTS
•	Pursuing degree Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering.
•	Understanding of the fundamentals of heat transfer and thermodynamics.
•	You need to be a hands on person, you are expected to be participating in root cause analysis on the manufacturing line.
•	Strong problem solving skills, must be excited about solving complex problems and have demonstrated that in the past.
•	3D modeling proficiency in CATIA v5, and good knowledge of 2D drawings as well as 3D GD&T.
•	Self-motivated, responsive, detail orientated, hands on and can work independently. 
•	Written communication skills and Oral Fluency in English preferred.
